summary: The diff only modifies project_state.json metadata and does not show the required principal photo asset replacement or any Home page reference updates. It also describes additional admin-panel editability that is explicitly a non-goal.

missing_requirements.requirement: Replace the existing principal photo used on the Home page with the newly uploaded principal image, processed as a clean 600×600 square PNG, saved at frontend/public/assets/generated/principal-photo.dim_600x600.png, and continue displaying via /assets/generated/principal-photo.dim_600x600.png with no layout regressions.
missing_requirements.reason: No diff evidence shows the principal image asset being updated/added at the required path, nor any Home page usage/reference being confirmed. The only modified file is project_state.json.

hallucinated_features.description: Admin panel functionality to make the Principal section content (photo/name/position/message) and Faculty/Staff group photo editable.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly lists creating new admin-panel functionality for uploading/changing the principal image as a non-goal; however the diff summary text claims such editability is included.
